untranslatable_reason: ARIMA confidence bands are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal specifically requires ARIMA model outputs (95% and 50% confidence bands with trend forecast), which cannot be replicated using only the provided technical indicators. Bollinger Bands were used as a conceptual proxy (lower band ≈ 95% confidence extreme, middle band ≈ 50% median), but this does not capture ARIMA's time-series forecasting logic or trend direction component.
translation_notes: Signal requires ARIMA-specific indicators not in allowed list. Substituted Bollinger Bands as nearest structural equivalent: bb_lower approximates extreme oversold (95% confidence band), bb_middle approximates return level (50% band). However, ARIMA trend forecast directionality cannot be encoded without the actual ARIMA indicator. Original signal intent: mean reversion in RANGING regimes with trend confirmation.
